honest_assessment_v2: 44 surfaces shipped clean across 13 waves. The marginal value of new pages is now near zero — every founder-noticeable bet has been made. The remaining high-leverage moves are all OUTSIDE the codebase: deploy URL, Loom recording, cold-read review, interview-day rehearsal. Wave 14 should be very small or pause.
